agent_result.summary:
## Summary
The function read_user_file() in src/file_server.py is vulnerable to path traversal attacks. To fix this, the filename should be sanitized to remove any ../ or ..\ before joining it with the base directory.

## Performance Observations
None found.

## Edge Cases
None found.

## Security & Correctness Issues
In src/file_server.py, the function read_user_file() is vulnerable to path traversal attacks. An attacker could potentially access files outside of the intended directory by providing a filename with ../ or ..\ in it.

## Architectural Suggestions
None found.

## Validation Outcome
None found.
